subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-26
subcodes.first_line: A believer in Baha'u'llah is he who is firm in the Covenant.... Is it possible that one may believe in a book without believing in the teacher
subcodes.first_line_orig: مومن بهاءالله کسی است که ثابت بر میثاق است هر کسی بپیمان الهی ثابت است مومن است
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @firmness in the Covenant, @Manifestation of God as sun, @station of the Manifestation of God
